name: Golden Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first four ingredients.
2. Cream butter and extracts until butter is softened.
3. Add sugar gradually, creaming until fluffy after each addition.
4. Add yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients in fourths, beating until just blended.
6. Form balls (1 inch) about 2 inches apart on ungreased sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
